title: Rate-Limit a Route with Middleware
description:
## Rate-Limit a Route with Middleware

Traefik's `RateLimit` middleware uses a token-bucket algorithm to cap the number of requests allowed through a route per time window. This protects backend services from traffic spikes and abuse.

**Your task:**

In the `traefik-lab` namespace:
1. Create a `Middleware` named `rate-limit` with `RateLimit` configured to allow a maximum of **10 requests per second** (`average: 10`) and a burst capacity of **20** (`burst: 20`).
2. Attach this middleware to the existing `IngressRoute` named `api-route` (already present in the namespace).

```bash
# Verify middleware:
kubectl get middleware rate-limit -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.rateLimit.average}'
# Verify it is attached:
kubectl get ingressroute api-route -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.routes[0].middlewares[0].name}'
```

hints.title: RateLimit middleware structure
hints.body: The average field sets the steady-state request rate (requests/second). The burst field allows short spikes above the average.
hints.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: rate-limit
  namespace: traefik-lab
spec:
  rateLimit:
    average: 10
    burst: 20
EOF

hints.title: Patching the IngressRoute
hints.body: Re-apply the IngressRoute with the middleware added to the middlewares list, or use kubectl patch.

setup_commands.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: api-route
  namespace: traefik-lab
spec:
  entryPoints:
  - web
  routes:
  - match: PathPrefix(`/api`)
    kind: Rule
    services:
    - name: backend
      port: 80
EOF

validation.description: Check that the RateLimit middleware exists with correct values and is attached to api-route

commands.command: kubectl get middleware rate-limit -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.name}'
kubectl get middleware rate-limit -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.rateLimit.average}'
kubectl get middleware rate-limit -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.rateLimit.burst}'
